item.description:
I’m Sandesh (pronounced Sun-they-sh), and I am a MS Student at Boise State University, currently working on my thesis titled “Diverse Program Input Generation for Dynamic Invariant Inference” where I work on modifying Evosuite to guide the genetic algorithm to explore various program paths.

I have a Bachelor’s degree in computer engineering and like to tinker with low-level things. I am a Systems Programmer, and an avid Rustacean (check out my projects on Github!).
